productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Round Dial Black Watches
description: Functionality meets fashion with this digital watch from adidas. With a stylish grey strap and packed with features, this watch is a must have for those who never compromise on style and comfort.Case diameter: 45 mm Case thickness: 12 mmDial shape: RoundPlastic case with a black polyurethane strap for enhanced durability and comfort Tang clasp to keep the watch firm in place as a belt buckle Fixed resin bezel for added durability Digital chronograph system where time is counted and accumulated in various formats independent of the main time, like displaying date, month, seconds, alarm, a stop watch, etc. Quartz movement of time display to ensure accurate time measurement Backlight to view time in low light conditionsScratch resistant mineral crystal to keep your watch safe and well protected for yearsSolid case back for enhanced life Water resistant at 100 meters allowing you to use it when swimming and showering
